title: dont bother
text: I purchased these earbuds because of how pleased i am with the quality of the JBL speaker that ive had for 6 years. These earbuds are great when they work properly. The first pair i received would randomly disconnect and have a loud techy feedback that would randomly happen. The sound quality was great in between these issues. I finally reached out to Harmon (JBL) customer service because these are covered under a 1 year warranty. CS walked me through resetting, connecting and disconnecting, trying different devices, and none of these things were successful in making these issues go away. They issued me a replacement, did not tell me i needed to send in my earbuds prior to the replacements being shipped, I use these daily for work so I wanted to continue using them while i waited for the replacements to come in. 2 weeks went past with out receiving the replacements. I reached out to Harmon CS again and was told the originals need to be sent back prior to the replacements being sent out

title: They stay comfortable in yur ears & connect to yur phone right away! I love them
text: [[VIDEOID:5bc430aecb5dbedf18e1d34554964770]]

title: Arrived opened, used, and missing an earbud
text:
Bought this product new. I have one of their clip speakers and I love that thing and figured since I was in need of some wireless Warburg, why not go with JBL once more. Clearly, a mistake. Product arrived with the factory sealing cut open and when I pull out the plastic tray, one of the ear buds is just straight up missing. Then, I took a look at the charging case and notice this thing has more general wear and tear than an old phone from high school. Then, just to top it off, the inside of the charging case has some very nice ear wax residue. Then finally, just to throw a little more salt on this opened wound, the ear bud I did receive can't even connect via Bluetooth.

I will update this review with more product information when my new pair arrives, but for now, let this stand as company quality control. Be sure to inspect your products upon arrival, folks!

title: They work great when they work
text: Once paired, these have a great sound quality. However keeping them paired is a problem. The device I'm using has to re-pair almost every time I try to use these. I wondered if it were the order of turning things on, or if there was some other user problem, nothing I can see makes a difference. I have to pair them again just about every time I try to use them on a device. Other bluetooth devices don't seem to behave this way.

title: Terrible instructions
text:
The earbuds work fine. They seem to be above average. Charging is fast and battery life is good.

The manuals are totally worthless. The safety instructions are useless unless you have a microscope. If anyone is hurt in any way using these earbuds, I believe you would have a perfect argument that the warnings are unusable and JBL has committed a failure to warn. .

The instruction are not much better. The only instructions are a quick start guide. Each page is printed in a different pair of colors that has insufficient contrast and hides the directions. There should be a slow start guide that has some detail. Just printing the directions out in a text format would be a gigantic improvement. Since the directions provided sucked so bad, I went to the JBL web page.

When I went on the JBL web site and looked to see if there was any more usable information. The answer is - no, not really. The only user instructions that are available is a copy of the quick s

title: Surprising Disappoinment
text: I can't believe how badly these sound. I have a cheap pair of Soundcore Liberty Neo's and Soundpeat wireless earbuds that sound WAY better. Never heard of that brand? That's because they're cheap. You've heard of JBL, they should be top notch. But they're not. The sound is tinny, the bass is very low. They fit extremely poorly- it's hard to tell how they go in your ear because of the awkward design. And they don't go into your ear solidly so you get a lot of background noise coming through. I am very pleased with my Bluetooth speaker from JBL, but extremely disappointed by these.

title: JBLs constantly drop out
text: JBLs constantly drop out. It sounds like it is fading and then fades back in. It has happened across several devices. This is really disappointing and my cheap $20 Bluetooth headphones never do this across the same devices. The sound quality is really good when it is actually connected and not dropping out. Very disappointed

title: Disappointing.
text: The worst and most overpriced earbuds I have ever owned. After less than a year, the buttons get stuck. The earbuds take like 60 seconds to pair. Not to mention the sound quality is quite poor for the price. The bass is non-existent and the highs are shrill. The only good things are the battery life and microphone-- but this doesn't make it worth the purchase unless you only want to call with these buds.

title: Love the sound, love the pairing, love everything!
text:
My first completely wire-free air buds! I'm still deeply concerned about losing them, but I just love them.

I've had a lot of trouble pairing basically everything with my Pixel phone, so I settled in with the Quick Start instructions and started taking them out of the case...as soon as I got the 2nd bud out of the case, my phone was like "Hey you wanna pair with this thing?" and I clicked YES and wow, that was easier than falling off a log. When you place one into your ear, it goes "reeep" and makes a little mechanical noise that I suppose sounds like something starting up, but never fails to startle me. Then there is another little chime to indicate that it has found and paired with my phone, which is always pretty instant. Even if I'm already on the phone, I can pop them in my ears (braced for the "reeeep") and boom, no more holding that stupid phone against my head.

I mainly use them for phone calls & podcasts, but I did test them out with music & found the sou

title: Where to start...
text:
I'll admit a few things outright first:
1) they sound average...I was definitely expecting more.
2) the case does charge quick as advertised!
3) for the price, they block out all the sounds...at the cost of deep battery draining bass found in comparable quality earbuds.
4) if I don't move much, they're Very comfortable.

Now, for the nitty gritty...I haven't read other reviews in depth...this is a blessing and a curse;
The breakdown:
1) they don't bump with rich bass like I'm used to with my Skullcandy wireless earbuds.
2) the audio at the beginning of each track (on my my phone, at least) fades into each track, which I don't like nor did I request, nor was it advertised.
3) I have tried all 3 earbud inserts on my left ear and none of the sizes seem to fit that ear, which cause the ear bud to fall out. I can see this being a huge problem whilst rocking out. I'm a headbanger and these aren't headbanger worthy and I've only had them less

title: One annoying issue
text:
My biggest problem is that one earbud likes to disconnect every few seconds and never turn back on until I remove and re-pair the earbuds (this is on a windows PC). Pairing it again fixes the issue, but it's temporary and I'll have to do it again the next time I use them.
Otherwise they work fine.

title: Battery life, sound quality
text: [[VIDEOID:52267ebace11797d7d899f0bd45e2b5d]] Great batter life, comes with differ rubber ear buds to find the perfect fit. The sound quality is very nice and does do a great job at hiding the background noise.

title: jbl  is good brand
text: I returned them before I got them and upgraded to jbl 300 live

title: Good, so far...
text: I've had these for a couple of months now.  Battery life is holding up.  Sound quality is holding up.  These are not overly sensitive to touching that causes unintended skipping and stopping in cheaper brands.  Ease of charging and dropping in and out of the charger is pleasant.  I have been on a iterative search for Bluetooth earbuds while spending the least amount of money.  I've been frustrated (To quote Kevin Kline in A Fish Called Wanda, "Disappointed!") with four tries of cheaper brands until now.  These just plain work as advertised.

title: Love these earbuds! Great sound, easy to use
text: I have an earlier version of these headphones that I love- these charge using the same coed as my phone so I no longer have to carry a separate cord to charge my headphones.  The sound quality is great. The pause feature is excellent- when you start to play your music again the volume ramps up instead of just blaring away immediately.  Price was great. held a charge for a long time.

title: Way too complicated for no reason.
text: Couldn't tell you how they sound or anything else.  They need some password that they do not provide and incredibly cannot be found anywhere on the internet.  Do not buy, just get the ipods.  I know they are more money but seriously... 2021, tech should be easy by now, not harder.

title: Uncomfortable fir
text: The sound quality is  pretty good though the "extra bass "is barely noticeable. The battery life is great.  BUT they are so uncomfortable  to wear  I've purchased several different sets and they all have one thing in common...they really aren't  made for smaller or  women's ears.

title: Not ideal for answering call
text: This is good for music listening but its not for calls. When someone called me and I pressed the earbuds to answer, it got switched back to my Iphone speaker and I lost the connection to the earbud. Very annoying

title: A mistake purchase
text: An accidentally purchased while trying to buy the 300's

title: So far not so good
text: If you use this just for music they work good. Phone calls are different. They get quite.

title: Do not purchase.
text:
Voice control is terrible at picking up what you say.
The button is not easy to press and will often have you drilling the earbud into your ear.
Split-controls are horrible for when I want to wear only one bud while I need to give some attention to my surroundings.
Noise cancellation is passive, so it’s no better than $15 cabled earbuds.
The signal will get jumbled after a few months, and being three feet from my phone with no obstructions between it and the earbuds, it frequently disconnected.
The case is massive compared to other options.

These are so terrible that I bought Airoods pro, which are almost four times the price, but infinitely more convenient, useful, and higher quality.

title: For calls the audio is sometimes an hit an miss but over all good for book listening for hours.
text: I like that they are loud and they are comfortable. You can even sleep in them a tidbit in the night but I would not suggest the whole night. I got these to listen to books on the go because I'm always on the go and it helps block out everyone else on the daily groove. When I have calls they do seem to have some audio issues but if you turn the volume down then back up it fixes it.

title: Best Bluetooth earbuds ever
text:
Ive purchased many different way buds, head sets cans, etc.
At far as Bluetooth these are the best ones I've ever had.
The connection is fast.
Sounds quality is beautiful.and clear.
They can gi.loud too if you need.
The just impressive thing,is I accidently washed my clothes with one of these in the pocket. I found out in the bottom of the washing machine. Oh no I thought.
The light was on. So I just put it on my night stand and let it dry food a day. The battery died.
So. After a day or so I put it in the charger case and took a gamble. They work!!! No sound issue. And seem ok. Í see if the battery life is still as good as normal, but, even this is impressive.
I love these. Just get a pair. Pass on cheaper ones and brands.. These are the best

title: These were a gift to my son,he is very happy with my choice!
text: My son's says these are very good ! He says they are very nice quality

title: Great sound, long battery life.  But they tend to fall out.
text: Great sound, long battery life.  But they tend to fall out.  The case charges the battery.  The ear buds have an 8-hour battery life.  Add to that the case has a 24-hour battery life.  You charge the case like any USB connected device.  My only complaint is that they tend to fall out, so I only feel safe using them when sitting.  I've tried various ear bud covers, but still have not found any that work to my satisfaction.

title: Not great as a microphone
text: Not great as a microphone. Better for listening to music.

title: Not bad!
text: I had the 120tws and these are the exact same size. Love the dual use feature, and the battery has lasted me a full 8hrs. The only complaint is occasionally the AirPods will switch songs randomly but other than that I have no complaints.

title: Disconnect randomly
text: These buds shut off a disconnect from my phone. It becomes a real pain when I'm working and I don't realize that they have turn off, and then get a call. Also when I put them back in the case they don't automatically shut off. I have to press and hold each of them otherwise they stay on even when the case is closed. Even though I got them on sale they aren't worth what I paid. Oh and they won't connect with the Samsung gear app and they aren't compatible with the JBL app either. They pretty much suck all around!

title: Super Good!
text: JBL has done it again!  These in-ear wireless headphones are great!  Even though my main use for these are for talking on the phone, the music quality is great.  Deep basses and clear sounds.  Battery life was great.  I had them for 5 days in the case without charging them with intermittent use during the day.  Totally worth it!

title: You can’t go wrong with JBL!
text: Incredible sound, long life, crystal clear great bass! 109% satisfied

title: Not as expected
text: Unable to change volume on the device.  Too loud even sound is already turned down on iphone.

title: Easy to use
text: I've had problems in the past trying to connect a bluetooth ear pod, trying to figure out how to do it, do I press this button or that button.........not with this!  You just take one ear piece out of the charging case and voila!  Love how you just have to take out of the charging case to listen, no buttons to press, except to answer the phone.  Want to disconnect  from your phone, just put them back in the case!  These also fit really well, I have not had any problem with them staying in my ear.  I've had these about a month and have only had to charge twice, once when I got them and once about two weeks ago, that being said, I really don't use them that much, just when I go to lunch at work or am sitting in my office and need a little music and don't want to disrupt anyone else.  I got the pink and white, they're very cute!  The sound quality is good, not great, but very good.....for a $60 pair of ear pods so worth it!  Enjoy!

title: Kept falling out of my ears
text: I really likes the sound quality as well as the microphone quality of these ear buds, however, since they would not stay in my ears no matter what I did, I had to return them.  I'm very active and am in the gym everyday.  Trying to make sure they don't fall out of my ears while on the squat machine, takes away from my workout.

title: I could t get it to stay in my year for the life of me
text: I couldn’t get them to stay in even with a different year attachment. Too big, heavy and bulky. It was a great deal as I got them on Amazon prime lighting sale but what good is it if I can’t keep them in my years . Too sad. I had high hopes for those. I really don’t know how people use them. People like them but I could not make them work, and I am pretty 💯 sure I placed them the right way.

title: Great sound
text: Was having alot of volume problems at first use and even created a return label for it but after playing it and letting it run the problem seam to stop and started playing clear and trouble free

title: Do not recommend. Disappointed
text: These were bought as a gift to be an upgrade from a knock and it wasn't even 3 months before one bud was bad. Same quality

title: Not great for calls or conferences
text:
Pros:
For earbuds, the sound quality is great when I'm listening to music.

I mainly wear overear headphones as a result earbuds will make my ears sore after a short while. With these, I feel I can wear them longer than other cheaper pairs I've worn.

The sound cancelation is nice. I have been wearing them at night as earplugs. They don't seem to be using noise cancelation tech. I think the headphones block out noise similar to earplugs, where they seat firmly in the ear.

Cons: I will need to return the pair due to a few issues. I hope these issues are just due to my headphones being defective.

While listening to music the sound will suddenly drop to zero. After a second or two the volume will slowly increase until the volume returns to normal.

A couple times the right ear piece wouldn't produce sound. Of course earbud was on, the battery was 100% and my phone was showing it was connected. When this was happening the left ear

title: Yesssss
text: The battery life is so much better than my beats ear buds!!!!!!!!! Thank you! But why don’t ear buds stay in my ears………

title: Junk,
text:
I finally decided I could get some "better" headphones or earbuds, since I an using them more than I have before. I should have saved the money. These sound like music playing through your phone speaker. The battery lasts maybe half the work day, and after a month or two of owning them, they cut out every few seconds, and wont actually keep playing music.

Reset? Ha! Tried that multiple times. Un pair, pair again.. nope. Don't waste your money on this high priced garbage.

title: I just got them and already stopped working.
text: They just stopped working. I got JBL because I was hoping with a name brand would come good quality. I pretty much just got this and I haven't even used them that much I keep them charged haven't dropped them or any thing. But my left ear will not work. 1 🌟

title: Not for the gym.
text: Sound great, killer battery life but don't  let them fall out!  Nothing but the rubber cup holding these in and thats a good bit of headphone hanging outside the ear.

title: There a bit large but work and connect great.
text: They work but charging the carrying case is extremely slow. It takes over 24hrs of charging if it dies to fully charge it up again.

title: A Good AirPods Alternative
text:
I have never liked the way that AirPods look and I think they are overpriced, so I went with these JBL wireless earbuds. I have been using them pretty frequently for over a month and I like them so far.

Pros:
-More affordable than AirPods
-Great sound quality with strong low end for earbuds
-Battery life is good enough that it has never limited my usage
-Noise cancelling works great

Cons:
-Volume is a bit quiet for my taste even at max (but I always listen at max volume with headphones)
-They occasionally fall out with excessive movement or if I bend over

title: They are cool
text: I’m new to bugs and pods and I wasn’t sure how noise cancellation was supposed to work . This doesn’t have an app to control the noise cancellation. the padding on the buds just stuff your ear. That’s the part I didn’t like. It wasn’t comfortable. It made my ears sound stuffy and I could like hear myself talking. Otherwise it did a good job of letting me ignore my family while I’m talking on the phone. The sound was good. Good music sound. Easy to pair . I don’t think the app for jbl products worked with these in particular. I lost one and there’s no way to locate it lol.

title: User instructions are ****ing USELESS
text: User instructions are ****ing USELESS

title: No bueno

title: Nice earbuds

title: Missing ear cones, no left/right indicator, no free manual download
text: Only came with small silicone ear cones, luckily I have others from other vendors. No left/right indicator; red and green would have been nice. Unable to download a PDF manual without installing third party software. The price was low, but I got what I paid for.

title: La vida de la bateria y la conectivida
text:
Hasta el momento no me ha dado problemas , solo que tarda un poco mas que otras marcas en conectar.
Suena muy bien y la bateria es duradera.

title: Love these
text: I went for these after trying the fancy Beats... these sound amazing.

title: Perfect

title: headphones
text: Ripp off only last 6 months and the do not pair anymore

title: Great quality at Black Friday prices
text: Got these to replace an older pair of ear buds.  I had always wanted a better quality pair of buds but always want to be fiscally responsible my funds and Black Friday allowed me the opportunity to get some high quality buds at a much better price.  Love the long battery life.

title: Their not all that
text: Well. They have issues in charging goes off and on. Get to the gym dont work. Than one work..and charge nothing. Not so loud. Dont sweat working out they fall out on any moisture. Thinking to return them.  Its a hassel to charge and no charge..or one works.

title: DO NOT BUY!! DELAYED IN SHIPPING AND SHOWS UP DEFECTIVE. ONLY 1 WORKS, 0 STARS
text: Showed up after being delayed in shipping and 1 earbud is completely dead. Wont power on after overnight charge, wont pair to device 0 star

title: Very good Wireless in-Ear!!
text: Very good quality of the sound! I'm very satisfied of this product! Very comfortable to wear, it doesn't bother me!

title: It sucks
text: Comes out of ear pretty easy. It sucks . Don't recommend

title: Horribly uncomfortable.
text: I could not get them to fit in my ears without the feeling that they would fall out.  I tried all the rubber inserts to no avail.  I will get another pair of the apple brand.  I gave my apple airpods to my wife.

title: Great quality ear buds!
text:
Love these ear buds! They deliver a great sound, and they work well—I’ve had very few disconnections, and I suspect those were the fault of my not-so-great wifi. They come with three sizes, so they fit well and they’re very comfortable. What’s more, they are stored in a small charger case which fits in the palm of my hand. So satisfying to click them into this case!
I bought a second pair as a birthday gift for my husband and he loves them, too.

title: Not reliable
text: One of the ear buds decided to stop working after a month or so. I left both buds in their case for a week, and the next time I tried to use them, one ear bud was non-functional. Seems to be a design flaw, as they had not been damaged.

title: Finally found the perfect earphones
text: Comfortable with great sound and long lasting power

title: Good item but defects in it
text: Item is great when it works. Constantly one bud does not connect and the build of the buds are bulky and heavy and not really working as ear buds.

title: Great quality
text: Well made ear buds. They charge up well and provide hours of excellent sound.

title: Sounds nice.
text: Bought these mainly to use when I’m cutting grass. I was very surprised how good they sound. Nice deep base and silky smooth highs. Volume is good and they were very easy to pair with my phone.

title: He loved them!
text: First pair of JVL headphones. My boyfriend loves them!
